channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
## What's New

### Channels Panel (DECK-71)
- New Channels tab in Settings — view channel status, QR login for WhatsApp, per-channel configuration
- Full channel lifecycle management from within ClawDeck

### Fixes & Improvements
- **Performance improvements** — smoother scrolling and reduced UI lag
- **Text truncation fix** — streaming segments now properly sync with final event content, no more cut-off messages
- **README cleanup** — removed direct download links per GitHub Support request

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/1devstudio/clawdeck/compare/v1.0.7...v1.1.0
